menu.message: Welcome to Fotographiya. We are dedicated to preservation through cinematic storytelling and premium imagery. How may we assist you today? Please choose an option below:

services.message:
Our Services

Choose a service you are interested in:

wedding_service.title: Wedding Photography
wedding_service.message:
Complete wedding photography coverage including:

- Full-day coverage (10-12 hours)
- Candid & Traditional photography
- 500+ high-resolution edited photos
- 45-minute documentary film
- 3-minute cinematic trailer
- Premium heirloom album
- Online gallery
- Team of 4-6 professionals

Occasions Covered:
• Wedding & Engagement
• Mehndi & Sangeet
• Reception

Price: Starting from ₹75,000

engagement_service.title: Engagement Photography
engagement_service.message:
Beautiful engagement photography coverage:

- 4-6 hours coverage
- Candid & Traditional photography
- 200+ high-resolution edited photos
- 2-minute highlight video
- Online gallery
- Professional editing

Price: Starting from ₹35,000

pre_wedding_service.title: Pre-Wedding Shoot
pre_wedding_service.message:
Pre-Wedding Photography Package:

- 4-5 hours photoshoot
- 2-3 locations
- 150+ edited photos
- Professional styling guidance
- 2-minute teaser video
- Online gallery

Price: ₹35,000

maternity_service.title: Maternity Shoot
maternity_service.message:
Beautiful maternity photography:

- 2-3 hours photoshoot
- Studio or outdoor location
- 50+ edited photos
- Professional retouching
- Digital gallery
- Multiple outfit changes allowed

Price: ₹18,000

baby_service.title: Baby Shoot
baby_service.message:
Precious baby photography:

- 2 hours photoshoot
- Studio setup
- 30+ edited photos
- Cute props and setups
- Digital gallery
- Professional editing

Price: ₹15,000

mehndi_service.title: Mehndi & Sangeet Photography
mehndi_service.message:
Vibrant Mehndi & Sangeet coverage:

- 4-6 hours coverage
- Candid & Traditional photography
- 200+ edited photos
- 2-minute highlight video
- Online gallery
- Colorful traditional moments captured

Price: Starting from ₹35,000

parties_service.title: Parties Photography
parties_service.message:
Party and celebration coverage:

- 3-4 hours coverage
- Candid photography
- 100+ edited photos
- Online gallery
- Fun and energetic moments

Price: Starting from ₹20,000

corporate_service.title: Corporate Events Photography
corporate_service.message:
Professional corporate event coverage:

- Full event coverage (4-8 hours)
- Professional headshots
- 150+ edited photos
- Quick turnaround
- Digital gallery
- Corporate branding included

Price: Starting from ₹25,000

booking_policy.title: Booking Policy
booking_policy.message:
Our Booking Policy:

📌 Advance Payment: 25% to confirm booking
📌 Cancellation Policy: Conditional
✈️ Outstation Travel: Available
✅ COVID-19: Following government guidelines

For more details, please contact our team.

book_event.successMessage:
Event Booking Request Submitted.

Thank you for choosing Fotographiya. Here is what happens next:

1. You will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours
